title: thea pitardii var. lucidissima
intro: Thea pitardii var. lucidissima, also known as the Yunnan gold tip tea, is a variety of the Thea pitardii plant, which is a type of tea plant native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thea pitardii var. lucidissima include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried leaves, which can be steeped in hot water to make a tea, and can also be used in infusions, tinctures, and capsules.
